name: Teinturier
description: Infecté spécialisé dont les mains sécrètent un pigment fongique corrosif. Il tache les murs, les armures et les véhicules, marquant les cibles pour la digestion à venir.
prompt: Sci-fi grimdark biomechanical horror, fungal corrosive creature. Humanoid with massively swollen hands dripping purple corrosive fungal pigment. Hands leaving glowing marks on corroded metal wall. Body hunched forward, focused on spreading fungal stains. Uniform dissolved by own secretions. Purple bioluminescent streaks on everything touched. Cinematic lighting, highly detailed.
